name: China Stock MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Chinese stock market data using AKShare — a Python-based financial data interface for A-shares, H-shares, and Chinese financial markets. Enables AI agents to query SSE (Shanghai) and SZSE (Shenzhen) stock prices, historical data, company fundamentals, and financial indicators from Chinese securities markets.
use_cases: Querying A-share stock prices and historical data from Chinese market analysis agents
Accessing Shanghai and Shenzhen exchange data for quantitative research agents
Retrieving Chinese company fundamentals and financial reports for investment agents
Building Chinese market analytics workflows using AKShare data via AI agents
not_for: Non-Chinese market stocks (US, European equities need different data sources)
Real-time trading (AKShare has data delays — not for HFT)
Teams without Chinese market knowledge and compliance requirements
best_when: A quantitative researcher or investor focused on Chinese A-share markets wants AI agents to access comprehensive Chinese securities data via AKShare's free data aggregation.
avoid_when: You trade US/European stocks or need real-time market data. Also: CN data residency concerns. Chinese market regulations apply.

auth.notes: No authentication required — uses AKShare which aggregates publicly available Chinese financial data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — AKShare uses publicly available data sources
pricing.notes: AKShare is free open source. Chinese financial data is publicly available from official exchange sources. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: AKShare rate limits depend on underlying data sources

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Stock data for investment decisions — verify data quality against official exchange sources
AKShare data sources may change — upstream source changes can break data availability
Chinese market trading hours and holidays differ from Western markets
Stock codes use Chinese exchange format (000001.SZ, 600000.SH) — different from Western tickers
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Investment decision data. Public Chinese financial data. CN data sources. No sensitive authentication data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public financial data. CN data sources. Financial decision risk.
